title: Lush Cave Bramble
description: Adds a Bramble spawning chamber to Lush Cave Ruins
body:
![A Bramble mob is floating in the Lush Cave Ruins with the text "The Bramble in Lush Cave Ruins By Braytonk" superimposed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f0c41304a039b4764aa21a9ba2d033f7928fcac.png)
## Bramble in the Lush Cave Ruins
This datapack adds a Bramble trial spawner room to each Lush Cave Ruins. Clear out the bramble to earn rare archeology loot!

Lush Cave Ruins can be found at https://modrinth.com/datapack/lush-cave-ruins

The Bramble can be found at https://modrinth.com/datapack/bramble

Note: This datapack must be higher up in the datapack load order than Lush Cave Ruins in order to function.
